description: Make meal prep simple and safe with this durable White Chopping Board (33 x 20 cm). Whether you're slicing fruit, prepping vegetables, or cutting meat, this board provides a compact yet sturdy surface for your daily kitchen tasks. Crafted from BPA-free plastic, it’s designed to be knife-friendly, easy to clean, and long-lasting. The non-slip surface keeps your ingredients in place while the minimalist white design adds a clean look to any kitchen. Dishwasher safe and lightweight, this cutting board is perfect for small kitchens, apartments, and busy households. Specifications: Size: 33 cm x 20 cm Medium Material: BPA-Free Plastic Color: White Features: Non-slip surface, lightweight, dishwasher safe Use: Meat, vegetables, fruits, cheese, herbs Safe for Dishwasher: Yes
